The Human
Counterpoint to
AI's Future

The AI Collective is the world's leading grassroots non-profit community of AI pioneers — built on the belief that the people shaping AI must also shape its values. We gather frontier technologists, researchers, and leaders to exchange insights, deepen human connection, and drive collective progress.

Three Pillars of Impact Barcelona · Event #2 · 2026

Where AI Talent Meets
Collective Intelligence

A global platform operating at the intersection of community, policy, and innovation — designed for the world's most ambitious AI minds. Now building its Barcelona chapter.

01 · Community
Global Network & Events

In-person trust built at scale. Salons, hackathons & demo nights across 120+ chapters in 30+ countries.

02 · Institute
AI Collective Institute

Bridging frontier technologists with policymakers. Translating research into governance. Giving AI builders a seat at the policy table.

03 · Investments
Collective Investments

Matching human-centric AI founders with values-aligned capital. Community-vetted deal flow built on trust.
